params.name: The Literary Mind
params.description: The first systematic literary theory text in China, comprising 50 essays. It proposed "spirit and structure" as core principles, blending emotion with form. Using metaphors from astronomy and ritual, it linked literature to cosmic order. Its ideas later shaped the Tang-Song prose reform and Confucian literary criticism.
